health_conditions: CIRS (chronic inflammatory response syndrome - mold illness)

benefits.description: Raises MSH for treatment of CIRS (mold illness)

side_effects.description: Significant tanning - describes self as transracial after nearly 3 years of use

protocol_notes: Using for nearly 3 years for CIRS treatment. Baseline skin tone was olive before MT2 use. User recommends staying out of sun, loading up on sunscreen, microdosing at night to reduce tanning, and cycling off for 1-2 weeks periodically.
